John Hadaway About Projects About  Projects  Twitter↗︎  Linkedin↗︎  Email↗︎ 

Estonian Shrinking Patterns [SPIN Unit] [2022]
Processed, analysed, and visualised building-level vacancy data for the Estonian Ministry of Economic Affairs. SPIN Unit↗︎

Recentre Jyväskylä [SPIN Unit] [2021]
Helped organise a high-street community for the City of Jyväskylä. Analysed spatial data, facilitated an activation workshop, and built the community's website. SPIN Unit↗︎

The New Modal [SPIN Unit] [2020]
Proccessed and analysed spatial data, working with a GTFS feed, to map mobility equity for the City of Tallinn. SPIN Unit↗︎

HKU Guild [2020]
Designed key visuals and worked on other ad hoc design tasks for the HKU Guild.

The AArcade [2020]
A (temporary) satirical outlet for students at the Architectural Association. Website↗︎

MetaNAR [SPIN Unit] [2019]
A workshop on mapping the digital footprint of Narva, Estonia, for the (Re)configuring Territories programme at the Narva Art Residency.

Art Map [2018]
An interface, built with both React and Unity, for navigating a ConvNet's internal representations of an art collection. Github↗︎

Articulyze [2017]
A website that aggregated long-form journalism about the world's most acute humanitarian crises, as defined by the UNOCHA's annual report. Github↗︎
